name: rabbit-feature
summary: Owns the rabbit-feature-touch orchestration skill and (absorbed) the rabbit-feature-scope skill with its resolve-scope.py and format-feature-context.py scripts. Dispatcher-side surface; executor-side (dispatch-tdd-subagent.py and tdd-step.py) lives in tdd-subagent and tdd-state-machine respectively.
deprecation_criterion: When feature-touch orchestration is natively handled by the rabbit CLI or by Claude Code's native workflow mechanism.
spec_no_change_reason: spec correction committed at 4b3ac5bb before TDD-cycle dispatch (analog to rabbit-feature-touch Step 3)
